channel.title: Episodes
channel.description: Goalhanger — The Rest Is Politics — Episodes

item.title: 508. Is Starmer Sleepwalking into War with Iran?
item.description: Is Keir Starmer sleepwalking into a war Britain never agreed to fight? What are Trump's real objectives in attacking Iran? How far will Iran's…

item.title: 506. Trump Attacks Iran: What Happens Now?
item.description: As Tehran launches retaliatory strikes against Israel and US military bases, how dangerous is this moment for the Middle East and the wider world?…

item.title: 505. Are Trump and Putin Underestimating Ukraine?
item.description: On the fourth anniversary of Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine, what's the reality on the ground? Why is Trump still calling the shots on…

item.title: Why Trump Wants Greenland
item.description: Why has Donald Trump considered invading Greenland? How does he think it will benefit him? What is the role of China in the Arctic? And what animals…

item.title: 503. Andrew’s Arrest: What Next?
item.description: Why has the disgraced Andrew Mountbatten Windsor been arrested? How damaging is this unprecedented moment for the royal family? How effective was…

item.title: 501. Is Starmer Too Soft on Trump? Inside the Munich Security Conference
item.description: Why did Trump's Secretary of State Marco Rubio 'love bomb' Europe at the Munich Security Conference, and how did it compare to JD Vance's infamous…

item.title: The Battle for the Arctic
item.description: One of the most important political issues of our time - the battle for the Arctic. Why is Russia so dominant there? Why does Trump really want…

item.title: 499. Is It Game Over for Starmer?
item.description: As Starmer begins to lose his key aides and allies, is his departure from Number 10 now a matter of when, not if? Is the UK actually becoming…

item.title: 496. Mandelson’s Disgrace: How Epstein Poisoned Our Politics
item.description: What do Peter Mandelson's ties to Jefferey Epstein reveal about the influence of the rich and powerful in British politics? Why did so many…

item.title: 494. Carney’s Trump Fightback and the Starmer-Burnham Fallout
item.description: Can the 'middle powers' escape Trump's grip and build a world beyond American and Chinese dominance? What is the 'Board of Peace' and why is Trump…

item.title: What If the AI Revolution Isn’t Real?
item.description: Is AI a revolution, or just another slow-moving general technology? Are we mistaking hype for inevitability? And, can a technology this unreliable…

item.title: 493. Trump Insults NATO Troops
item.description: Why has Trump chosen to denigrate the sacrifice of allied soldiers? Are Keir Starmer and other NATO leaders finally reaching a breaking point with…

item.title: 491. Trump at Davos: Rory and Alastair React
item.description: What does Trump's rambling speech to world leaders at Davos mean for Greenland? Are Europe and the UK ready to act together against Trump's threats?…

item.title: 490. Trump’s Greenland Ultimatum: What Next?
item.description: Is the US now an adversary for Europe? Has Europe's appeasement strategy failed? How should NATO respond if appeasement is no longer an option? Join…

item.title: Will AI End Humanity?
item.description: If there is even a 1% chance that AI could destroy us, should we keep building it? Are we creating machines that will one day outthink humanity? And…

item.title: 488. Is Iran on the Edge of Revolution?
item.description: Could the Iran protests finally break the Supreme Leader’s brutal reign, or will the regime's deadly crackdown contain the unrest? If the US…

item.title: China vs USA: Who Will Win the AI Race?
item.description: Who really controls AI; governments, corporations, or no one at all? Is AI becoming a new kind of global arms race? And, can we keep humans in…

item.title: 486. Does Maduro’s Capture Put Greenland at Risk?
item.description: Is Venezuela the start of something bigger? If this isn’t regime change, what does Trump actually want? And, has Trump just handed Putin a win? Join…

item.title: 485. Trump Says America will Run Venezuela
item.description: Trump has announced that Venezuela will now be run by Washington as US forces have captured Nicolás Maduro and taken him to stand trial in New York.…

item.title: 483. The Future of British Politics, How The World Order Is Changing, and The Power of History
item.description: What does this year look like for the future of British politics? How is the global order going to be reshaped? And will the power of historical…

item.title: 482. A Trumpian Year, the Politics of Hope and Highlights of 2025
item.description: What surprised Rory and Alastair most about 2025? Why does Trump's presidency feel even more chaotic than expected? And who gets their vote for…

item.title: 481. Polanski, Macron & al-Sharaa: The Best & Worst Politicians of 2025
item.description: Who deserves the title of UK politician of the year - and who gets worst? What was the most consequential moment of Trump's presidency so far? And…

item.title: Will AI Take Our Jobs? (Ep 2)
item.description: Is AI a genuine productivity revolution, or just another tech bubble? Are any jobs safe from the advent of AI? And, can the UK harness the…

item.title: 479. Russian Influence in Britain: How Exposed Are We?
item.description: Why are Britain’s top military and intelligence chiefs sounding the alarm about Putin’s influence and future plans? How deeply has Russia already…

item.title: How Will AI Change The World? (Ep 1)
item.description: How will AI reshape the way we live, earn, and design our lifestyles over the next decade? With investment in AI increasing a billion fold the last…

item.title: 477. How Trump’s Security Strategy Destroys The Old World Order
item.description: Has Trump's 2025 National Security Strategy officially upended 80 years of American foreign policy? Why does it warn of Europe's "civilisational…

item.title: 475. The Budget Backlash – and Trump’s Plan to Profit from Peace in Ukraine
item.description: Is the media too negative about Reeves and Starmer, or are they simply out of ideas? What has the relentless Budget turmoil and fallout done to…

item.title: Introducing: The Rest Is Science
item.description: Forget what you think you know about reality. The Rest Is Science is a mind-bending new show from Goalhanger that tears down familiar ideas… time,…

item.title: 474. Does Reeves' Budget Really Change Anything? What It Means For You
item.description: Was this 'the most leaked Budget' of all time? Has Rachel Reeves managed to balance the demands of the public, the markets, industry, and her party?…

item.description: Who is really behind the White House 'peace plan' for Ukraine: Trump or Putin? Why isn't Europe taking the threat from Russia more seriously, and…

item.description: Why did Boris Johnson and the British government not only fail to listen, but actively try to suppress early warnings about the pandemic? How did…

item.description: After a week of turmoil, can Labour recover their support or are they already doomed to lose the next election? Are Shabana Mahmood's immigration…

item.title: 467. The Mamdani Method Explained: Could It Shock Britain?
item.description: How did a thirty four-year old democratic socialist win over New York, and can he actually follow through on his promise to transform the city? What…

item.title: 466. Crisis Engulfs the BBC: Is this a Coordinated Attack?
item.description: Why have the BBC’s Director General and Head of News both suddenly resigned? Is this an internal 'coup' at the BBC or a 'concerted' attack by its…

item.title: Murdoch's Succession Battle and the Fight for Fox News
item.description: What are the key differences between Murdoch's children, particularly Lachlan and James? How do the internal family conflicts of the Murdochs mirror…

item.description: Is this the Budget that breaks Labour, or can Reeves walk the tightrope? Why does the general public increasingly think we’re overreacting to…

item.description: What does Labour’s unprecedented collapse in Wales really mean? If Putin takes Ukraine, which European neighbour is next? What can Starmer learn…

item.description: What was the phone-hacking scandal and how did it escalate into a major crisis? How was Alastair himself implicated? What did Rupert Murdoch's…

item.description: Is Trump selling peace to the highest bidder? Is the Farage surge in Wales a warning shot for Westminster? Why is the UK going backwards again on…

item.description: Has Starmer’s reshuffle shifted Labour to the right, and frozen out the left? Will Farage ultimately lose control of Reform UK? Why has the French…

item.description: Is Netanyahu’s illegal bombing of Doha yet another death knell for international law? Why is the West’s response so lacklustre? Is Trump secretly…

item.description: Just how damaging is Angela Rayner’s dramatic exit for the UK government? Has Starmer gone too early with his cabinet reshuffle? What does this mean…

item.description: Is appeasing Trump and Putin a recipe for disaster in Europe , or simply a pragmatic approach? Why was JD Vance so silent in Zelensky's second White…

item.description: What does 'no deal' mean for Ukraine and Europe? What was agreed behind closed doors? How will Zelensky respond? Join Rory and Alastair as they…
